---
title: Customer
description: Customer commands for the Retask CLI.
---

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED from `retask help-llm`. Do not edit by hand; run `yarn gen:cli`. -->
## `retask customer profile get`

Get your customer profile

```bash
retask customer profile get
```

## `retask customer profile set`

Update your customer profile

**Flags:** `--name`, `--email`, `--timezone`, `--theme`

```bash
retask customer profile set --name Alice --timezone America/New_York
```

## `retask customer list`

List customers (admin only)

```bash
retask customer list
```

## `retask customer get`

Get a customer by ID

```bash
retask customer get <customer-id>
```
